creator: .@babolo.ru
text:
${ENV} is not defined in bsd.*.mk files, but it is used in /bin/sh
as startup script.

How-To-Repeat: 
Define some startup script for /bin/sh without exec permission 
(sh need not) and try make in ports/graphics/libimg.
You see:
 
/home/babolo/.bashrc: permission denied
"Makefile", line 44: warning: "/home/babolo/.bashrc TCL_VER= make -f /usr/ports/graphics/libimg/files/Makefile.bsd environ" returned non-zero status

where /home/babolo/.bashrc is my /bin/sh startup script without x permission
